arts.ttl: FC Copenhagen vs. Heidenheim preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's UEFA Europa Conference League clash between FC Copenhagen and FC Heidenheim, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Does Paul Wanner have a future at Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Paul Wanner faces a decision on his future at parent club Bayern Munich, once he returns from his loan at Heidenheim. The 19-year-old wants to be a…
